summary: Tested PVP Room ID fix - CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED. The pvpRoomId is now properly passed to PVPBattleArena component. Backend tests pass: game creation, joining, ready-up, and game start all return proper pvp_room_id. Frontend UI shows lobby working correctly with both players visible.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIX: PhotoGameArena.jsx line 1761 - pvpRoomId resolution with fallback chain (incomingPvpRoomId > gameData.pvp_room_id > gameData.active_session_id > sessionId)
VERIFIED FIX: PhotoGameArena.jsx line 1781 - setPvpRoomId called BEFORE setGameState to ensure proper state propagation
VERIFIED FIX: PVPBattleArena.jsx line 109 - Component has fallback to derive pvpRoomId from session object if prop is undefined
VERIFIED FIX: GameLobby.jsx line 292 - game_start handler properly passes data.pvp_room_id to onGameStart
seed_data_creation: Updated password for test@example.com user to test123 for PVP testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP Room ID fix has been verified. The critical bug where pvpRoomId was undefined on first render of PVPBattleArena has been fixed. Test users: test@blendlink.com/admin and test@example.com/test123 both have 5+ minted photos for PVP testing. Backend API flow: create game -> join game -> both ready -> start game returns pvp_room_id properly.
rca_of_the_issue: Root Cause: React state propagation issue where pvpRoomId was not reaching PVPBattleArena component on first render. The fix involved: 1) Enhanced pvpRoomId resolution with fallback chain in handleGameStart, 2) Reordered state updates to set pvpRoomId BEFORE gameState transition, 3) Added fallback in PVPBattleArena to derive pvpRoomId from session object if prop is undefined.
